# Idea for a Universal History with a Cosmopolitan Purpose

*[Kant](../philosophers/kant.md) · 1784*

An essay where Kant reads history as the unfolding of a plan of nature: through human "unsocial sociability", the species advances toward a perfect civil constitution and a peaceful federation of peoples. History is here conceived as a regulative idea rather than mere contingency.
